title: Prompt Design Path
description: Build fluency in Prompt Design inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Value Alignment

steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
